section_name: Funding for Certain Commercial Service Airports
text: To the extent consistent with federal funding restrictions, a project involving a commercial service airport is eligible for financial assistance under this subchapter, including for inclusion in the aviation facilities capital improvement program, if the airport is located in a county along the Texas-Mexico border that has a population of less than 300,000.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.115 — Funding for Certain Commercial Service Airports

To the extent consistent with federal funding restrictions, a project involving a commercial service airport is eligible for financial assistance under this subchapter, including for inclusion in the aviation facilities capital improvement program, if the airport is located in a county along the Texas-Mexico border that has a population of less than 300,000.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 845 (H.B.138), Sec. 1, eff. June 14, 2013.*
